extortion.description: Rich in history, fuelled by innovation Innovation drives us at AC Laser. As a family-owned and operated business now in its second generation of management, we’ve been pioneers in laser cutting, fabrication and component manufacturing for two decades. Founded in 1991 and now celebrating 20 years under current ownership (May 2004), we continue to set new benchmarks in our industry.  Our state-of-the-art facility is equipped with the latest technology and operates 24/7 to ensure we meet every deadline. Committed to performance and safety, we uphold international standards with ISO certifications in Quality, Environmental, Welding and OH&S.  With a focus on high-quality workmanship and exceptional service, our friendly team of experts provides reliable, cost-effective, market-leading solutions to various industries nationwide.
